mosunetuzumab.measured_vs_derived: CD20 KD=class(rituximab/type-I anti-CD20 lineage, cell-based 5.45nM); CD20 kon=class-measured(rituximab SPR 4.3e5); CD20 koff=DERIVED(kon*KD). CD3 KD=schema-default 40nM (molecule-specific SPR not in accessible lit; anti-CD3 clone 40G5c); CD3 kon=std-mAb 1e5; CD3 koff=DERIVED. kint/ksyn/kdeg=class-estimate (CD20 non-internalizing, Ferl2018). MW/format=MEASURED(Zhu2025 Table1). Regimen=MEASURED(USPI/Lunsumio).
mosunetuzumab.validation_data: Clinical serum PK (conc-time), CRS/IL-6 & cytokine time-course figures, B-cell depletion, exposure-response (ORR) in catalog digitized_data & figures; Hosseini2020 QSP mitigates CRS via step-up.

sources.KD_TAA: rituximab-type (type-I) anti-CD20 lineage; cell-based Kd 5.45 nM, PMC11158754 Table2 (specific parent clone designation not sourced in-session; type-I class attribution only)
sources.kon_koff: anti-CD20 SPR kon (ka)=4.3e5 /M/s adopted from rituximab (Beck, ScienceDirect S0003269722000914). koff_TAA is DERIVED = kon*KD using the cell-based KD 5.45 nM (=2.34e-3 /s), NOT the same study's measured kd=7.2e-5 /s. That measured kd pairs with a tight SPR KD ~0.17 nM (kd/ka); it was not adopted because KD_TAA is anchored to the cell-based 5.45 nM value, so only the kon is taken from that study.
sources.KD_CD3: schema default 40 nM; mosun anti-CD3=40G5c (Genentech); Betts2019 class-ref CD3 KD 11.4 nM (10.1208/s12248-019-0332-z) as alt
sources.regimen: C1: 1mg D1, 2mg D8, 60mg D15; C2 D1 60mg; C3+ 30mg Q3W, 21-day cycles, IV (Lunsumio USPI; Zhu2025)

glofitamab.measured_vs_derived: 2:1 format => TAA n=2 (bivalent CD20 avidity), CD3 n=1 — MEASURED(Bacac2018/Zhu2025). CD20 KD=class-estimate(obinutuzumab GA101 type-II ~4nM); CD20 kon=class-measured(anti-CD20 SPR 4.3e5); CD20 koff=DERIVED. CD3 KD=schema-default 40nM; CD3 koff=DERIVED. kint=class-estimate (type-II obinutuzumab internalizes SLOWER than type-I, Dalle2011). MW 197kDa & regimen=MEASURED.
glofitamab.validation_data: Clinical PK (Hutchings JCO2021, n=171), CRS 50.3%/IL-6 kinetics, obinutuzumab-pretreatment effect, exposure-response; catalog BLOOD supplement + digitized figures.

sources.KD_TAA: obinutuzumab(GA101)-derived type-II CD20 arm, high-affinity ~4 nM class-estimate (Bacac2018 10.1158/1078-0432.CCR-18-0455; GA101 lineage)
sources.kon_koff: anti-CD20 SPR kon 4.3e5 /M/s class-measured (rituximab, S0003269722000914); koff derived kon*KD (per-arm intrinsic; 2:1 avidity handled by n_arm_TAA=2 in model)
sources.KD_CD3: schema default 40 nM; Roche humanized anti-CD3 (shared with CD20-TCB); Betts2019 class-ref 11.4 nM alt
sources.kint: type-II anti-CD20 slower internalization than type-I (Dalle2011 MCT); class-estimate 0.05/day
sources.regimen: Obinutuzumab 1000 mg IV day -7 (Gpt); glofitamab 2.5mg C1D1, 10mg C1D8, 30mg C2D1(=D22) then 30mg Q3W, 21-day cycles, IV (Hutchings 10.1200/JCO.20.03175)

glofitamab.KD_CD3_source: FDA BLA 761309 SPR Study 1108724 (KD=4-5nM CD3e); CD20 EC50 4.3nM cell-based

epcoritamab.measured_vs_derived: CD20 KD=class-measured(ofatumumab/7D8 parent clone 4.76nM); CD20 kon=class-measured(anti-CD20 SPR 4.3e5); CD20 koff=DERIVED. CD3 KD=schema-default 40nM; CD3 koff=DERIVED. Fc-silenced IgG1 (L234F/L235E/D265A) but FcRn intact => fFcRn=1.0 (MEASURED, Engelberts2020). SC route & 3-step regimen=MEASURED(Zhu2025/USPI). kint/turnover=class-estimate.
epcoritamab.validation_data: Clinical SC PK (conc-time LOESS, catalog PMC13338999), CRS/IL-6 peak vs step-up, B-cell depletion, exposure-efficacy (EPCORE NHL-1/-3); SC gives lower/delayed Cmax & reduced cytokines vs IV.

sources.KD_TAA: 7D8/ofatumumab-derived CD20 arm; ofatumumab cell-based Kd 4.76 nM (PMC11158754 Table2); DuoBody controlled Fab-arm exchange (Engelberts2020 10.1016/j.ebiom.2019.102625)
sources.kon_koff: anti-CD20 SPR kon 4.3e5 /M/s class-measured (S0003269722000914); koff derived kon*KD
sources.KD_CD3: schema default 40 nM; Genmab humanized anti-CD3 arm; Betts2019 class-ref 11.4 nM alt
sources.mw_format: Humanized IgG1 1:1 DuoBody 149 kDa, Fc-silenced L234F/L235E/D265A (Zhu2025 Table1; Engelberts2020)
sources.regimen: SC: 0.16mg SUD1 D1, 0.8mg SUD2 D8, 48mg full D15; QW cycles1-3, Q2W 4-9, Q4W >=10, 28-day cycles (Epkinly USPI; Chen 10.1002/cpt.3588)

odronextamab.measured_vs_derived: CD20 KD=class-estimate(anti-CD20 class ~5nM; fully-human REGN clone, cytotox EC50 15-84pM Smith2015); CD20 kon=class-measured(4.3e5); CD20 koff=DERIVED. CD3 KD=schema-default 40nM; CD3 koff=DERIVED. IgG4 native-format 1:1=MEASURED(Zhu2025). Regimen step-up days APPROXIMATE (RP2D 80mg FL/160mg DLBCL MEASURED). kint/turnover=class-estimate.
odronextamab.validation_data: Clinical PK (fully-human IgG4, cyno t1/2 ~14 days Smith2015), CRS/IL-6 driven QSP step-up optimization (mechanistic cytokine model), ORR exposure-response (ELM-1/ELM-2); catalog Zhu2022 supplement (cytokine release assays).

sources.KD_TAA: fully-human CD20 arm (REGN1979); no public SPR KD — anti-CD20 class-estimate ~5 nM; functional cytotox EC50 15-84 pM (Smith2015 10.1038/srep17943)
sources.kon_koff: anti-CD20 SPR kon 4.3e5 /M/s class-measured (S0003269722000914); koff derived kon*KD
sources.KD_CD3: schema default 40 nM; Regeneron anti-CD3 arm; Betts2019 class-ref 11.4 nM alt
sources.mw_format: Fully human IgG4 1:1 146 kDa (Zhu2025 Table1; Smith2015 native-format bispecific IgG4)
sources.regimen: IV step-up (split doses) cycle1 ~0.7/4/20 mg then RP2D 80 mg FL / 160 mg DLBCL, weekly->Q2W (Zhu2025; Bannerji ELM-1 35366963). Step-up days approximate.

blinatumomab.measured_vs_derived: CD19 KD=MEASURED(flow 1.49nM, HD37 clone) - NOT SPR; CD3 KD=MEASURED(flow 260nM, L2K/TR66-derived) - NOT SPR. kon=std-mAb 1e5 (no published SPR); koff=DERIVED(kon*KD) for BOTH arms. MW 54kDa BiTE no-Fc => fFcRn=0 MEASURED. Continuous IV, dose in ug/day. IL-6 Cmax MEASURED(NHL). kint/turnover CD19 class-estimate.
blinatumomab.validation_data: Rich clinical PK/PD: NHL phase1 n=76 (Zhu 10.2174/1574884713666180518102514) - Css vs dose, B-cell depletion <48h at >=5 ug/m2/d, tumor-shrinkage Emax (50% at AUCcum>=1340 h*ug/L, Css>=1830 pg/mL), cytokine Cmax; ALL approved 9->28 ug/day.

sources.KD_TAA: CD19 KD 1.49 nM by flow cytometry, anti-CD19 HD37 scFv (canonical Amgen/NCI value; NOT SPR)
sources.kon_koff: no published SPR kon/koff for either arm; kon set to std mAb 1e5 /M/s; koff derived = kon*KD (CD19 1.49e-4 /s, CD3 2.6e-2 /s)
sources.KD_CD3: CD3 KD 260 nM by flow (low-affinity anti-CD3, TR66/L2K lineage); NOT SPR
sources.kint: CD19 moderately internalizing, class-estimate 0.15/day (faster than CD20)
sources.mw_format: BiTE tandem-scFv, ~54 kDa, NO Fc (Ferl2018 states 55 kDa); fFcRn=0 (no FcRn recycling, t1/2 ~2 h)
sources.regimen: Continuous IV infusion. ALL approved: 9 ug/day (D1-7) -> 28 ug/day (D8-28), 4-wk cycles [encoded as mg/day]. NHL study: 5-15-60 ug/m2/day step-up. IL-6 Cmax ~2460 pg/mL at 60 ug/m2/day flat first dose.

teclistamab.name: teclistamab
teclistamab.measured_vs_derived: BCMA & CD3 kon/koff: MEASURED-in-QSP (Janssen translational QSP, units 1/nM/d & 1/d, converted to /M/s & /s). KD_CD3=28.03nM from FDA review. kint_BCMA=2/d MEASURED (Lee 2016). ksyn/kdeg DERIVED from turnover identity ksyn=Rtot*(kshed+kint). Regimen mg = 0.06/0.3/1.5 mg/kg at 80kg.
teclistamab.validation_data: MajesTEC-1 popPK; QSP-modeled IL-6 (observed mean peak ~21.5 pg/mL, PSP4 2024 Fig2); serum IL-6 up to ~520 pg/mL in CRS cases

sources.KD_TAA: Janssen teclistamab QSP suppl, KD_BCMA=0.18nM (koff20/kon111); DOI 10.1002/psp4.70105
sources.kon_koff: Teclistamab QSP: kon_mBCMA=111/nM/d, koff=20/d; kon_CD3=10/nM/d, koff_CD3=285/d (koff3 ref: Li epcoritamab CPT 2022)
sources.KD_CD3: FDA Multi-Disciplinary Review Teclistamab 2022 (KD_CD3=28.03nM)
sources.kint: Lee 2016 Br J Haematol 174(6):911, PMID 27313079 (BCMA kint=2/d)
sources.regimen: Tecvayli USPI: SC 0.06, 0.3 mg/kg step-up then 1.5 mg/kg QW

elranatamab.name: elranatamab
elranatamab.measured_vs_derived: KD_BCMA=0.04nM & kon=86/nM/d MEASURED-in-model (Yoneyama Table 2, src PF-06863135 refs 29,31). koff_BCMA DERIVED=kon*KD. KD_CD3=17nM from AMG420 platform value (ref 32) — shared CD3, flag. kon_CD3 ASSUMED=kon_BCMA (single-kon model); koff_CD3 DERIVED. kint_BCMA=2/d class (Lee 2016). ksyn/kdeg DERIVED.
elranatamab.validation_data: MagnetisMM-1/-3 popPK; IL-6 digitized (Nat Med 2023 Fig6): priming-only peak ~340 pg/mL, priming+premed peak ~230 pg/mL; CPT 2025 CRS-cytokine PK-PD model

sources.KD_TAA: Yoneyama 2022 PLOS Comput Biol Table 2, KD_BCMA=0.04nM; DOI 10.1371/journal.pcbi.1009715
sources.kon_koff: Yoneyama Table 2: kon=86/nM/day (ref 31); koff calc from kon and KD
sources.KD_CD3: Yoneyama Table 2 KD_CD3=17nM (source AMG420, ref 32 — platform CD3 value)
sources.regimen: Elrexfio USPI: SC 12, 32 mg step-up then 76 mg QW

linvoseltamab.name: linvoseltamab
linvoseltamab.measured_vs_derived: KD_BCMA~1nM = literature/CLASS-ESTIMATE (full-length IgG4 BCMAxCD3, standard/normal CD3 affinity — the high-CD3-affinity sibling of REGN5459). kon set to standard mAb 1e5/M/s; koff DERIVED=kon*KD. KD_CD3=35nM CLASS-ESTIMATE (normal-affinity CD3). kint/ksyn/kdeg BCMA class.
linvoseltamab.validation_data: LINKER-MM1 popPK (IV step-up then 200 mg QW→Q2W/Q4W); no binding-characterization or cytokine digitized data in catalog

sources.KD_TAA: Class estimate; linvoseltamab = REGN5458, full-length IgG4 BCMAxCD3 (Bar et al 2025 review, normal CD3 affinity vs REGN5459)
sources.kon_koff: DERIVED: standard mAb kon 1e5/M/s, koff=kon*KD
sources.KD_CD3: Class estimate (standard CD3 affinity, contrast REGN5459 low-affinity variant)
sources.regimen: Lynozyfic/LINKER-MM1: IV 5, 25 mg step-up then 200 mg QW

alnuctamab.name: alnuctamab
alnuctamab.measured_vs_derived: FORMAT well-documented: 2+1 IgG1, BIVALENT BCMA (n_arm_TAA=2) + MONOVALENT low-affinity CD3e (n_arm_CD3=1). KD_BCMA~0.3nM and KD_CD3~25nM are CLASS-ESTIMATES — NO primary binding paper was successfully fetched (EM801 precursor gave abstract stub only). kon standard 1e5/M/s, koff DERIVED=kon*KD. kint_BCMA=2/d (Lee 2016). ksyn/kdeg via turnover identity. VERIFY KDs against patent WO2020219978A1.
alnuctamab.validation_data: CC-93269-MM-001 (NCT03486067) phase-1 PK; IV CRS 76% (grade>=3 7%) then pivoted to SC; no binding/cytokine digitized data in catalog

sources.KD_TAA: CLASS-ESTIMATE — no primary binding paper successfully retrieved. Format (2+1 IgG1, bivalent BCMA / monovalent low-affinity CD3e) is well-documented across ASH phase-1 abstracts (CC-93269/BMS-986349). Monovalent KD_BCMA~0.3nM inferred from precursor EM801 (Seckinger 2017 Cancer Cell 10.1016/j.ccell.2017.02.002 — abstract stub only, KD not extractable). TREAT AS ESTIMATE, verify against BMS patent WO2020219978A1 before use.
sources.kon_koff: DERIVED: standard mAb kon 1e5/M/s, koff=kon*KD
sources.KD_CD3: CLASS-ESTIMATE (qualitative 'low-affinity CD3e' from phase-1 abstracts); ~25nM placeholder, not from a verified primary source.
sources.regimen: CC-93269 SC step-up (approx; escalation study)

REGN5459.name: REGN5459
REGN5459.measured_vs_derived: DELIBERATELY LOW CD3 AFFINITY variant (Regeneron), same BCMA arm as REGN5458/linvoseltamab. KD_CD3~500nM = LOW-AFFINITY PLACEHOLDER (qualitative 'low CD3 affinity'; exact fold not published) — FLAG, tune in model. KD_BCMA~1nM class estimate. kon standard, koff DERIVED.
REGN5459.validation_data: Phase 1/2 FIH (AACR CT013); low CD3 affinity gave high response with low CRS; no PK/cytokine digitized data in catalog

sources.KD_TAA: Class estimate (shares REGN5458 BCMA arm)
sources.kon_koff: DERIVED: standard mAb kon, koff=kon*KD
sources.KD_CD3: REGN5459 = 'BCMAxCD3 with LOW CD3 affinity' (AACR Abstract CT013, 2023); quantitative value not published — 500nM placeholder, FLAG
sources.regimen: FIH escalation (not fixed)

talquetamab.name: talquetamab
talquetamab.measured_vs_derived: KD_GPRC5D~11nM & KD_CD3e~1.9nM: from Eckmann Blood 2025 stating talquetamab monovalent affinities are 'in the same range' as forimtamig (ref 28=talquetamab) — cross-referenced, flag. 1+1 IgG4 DuoBody, monovalent GPRC5D + monovalent CD3e. kon standard, koff DERIVED. kint_GPRC5D=2/d CLASS-ESTIMATE (GPCR, poorly characterized).
talquetamab.validation_data: MonumenTAL-1 popPK (CL0 2.08 L/d); IL-6 digitized (Targeted Onc 2024): observed median peak ~18 pg/mL, observed MAX ~212 pg/mL; MABEL EC20 0.083 nM

sources.KD_TAA: Eckmann Blood 2025 (forimtamig paper, DOI 10.1182/blood.2024025987): talquetamab GPRC5D monovalent affinity 'same range' ~11nM
sources.kon_koff: DERIVED: standard mAb kon 1e5/M/s, koff=kon*KD
sources.KD_CD3: Eckmann Blood 2025: talquetamab CD3e 'same range' ~1.9nM
sources.regimen: Talvey USPI: SC 0.01/0.06 mg/kg step-up then 0.4 mg/kg QW (mg at 80kg)

forimtamig.name: forimtamig
forimtamig.measured_vs_derived: MEASURED by GCI (Eckmann Blood 2025 Fig1D): GPRC5D monovalent KD=11nM, BIVALENT AVIDITY KD=0.2nM (>50-fold), CD3e KD=1.9nM. 2+1 head-to-tail, BIVALENT GPRC5D (n_arm_TAA=2)+monovalent CD3 (n_arm_CD3=1). KD_TAA=0.2nM (bivalent avidity used as effective). kon standard, koff DERIVED. kint class.
forimtamig.validation_data: Phase-1 (NCT04557150) IV & SC escalation; superior potency vs other GPRC5D/BCMA TCBs (Eckmann 2025); no cytokine digitized data in catalog

sources.KD_TAA: Eckmann Blood 2025 (DOI 10.1182/blood.2024025987, PMC11738037) GCI: GPRC5D monovalent 11nM, bivalent avidity 0.2nM
sources.kon_koff: DERIVED: standard mAb kon 1e5/M/s, koff=kon*KD (GCI koff not tabulated in main text)
sources.KD_CD3: Eckmann Blood 2025 GCI: CD3e KD=1.9nM
sources.regimen: RG6234 phase-1 IV/SC escalation (not fixed)

cevostamab.name: cevostamab
cevostamab.measured_vs_derived: KD_FcRH5=0.016nM (1.605e-11 M) & KD_CD3e=0.033nM (3.265e-11 M): MEASURED by BLI on clinical molecule (vendor QC, MedChemExpress/Selleck) — flag vendor-not-peer-reviewed. Humanized IgG1 TDB, MW 145.2 kDa. Format 1+1 (Genentech knob-in-hole TDB; master-table '2:1' likely mislabel — FLAG). kon standard, koff DERIVED. kint_FcRH5=1/d CLASS-ESTIMATE (FcRH5 internalizes slower than BCMA). NO catalog package.
cevostamab.validation_data: GO39775 phase-1 (NCT03275103) IV Q3W step-up, linear PK, t1/2 supports Q3W; no PK/cytokine data in catalog (cevostamab absent from catalog)

sources.KD_TAA: BLI (MedChemExpress/Selleck cevostamab QC): FcRH5 KD=1.605e-11 M (0.016nM). Research-clone precursor: Li 2017 Cancer Cell 10.1016/j.ccell.2017.02.001 (1G7 12nM/10A8 3nM Scatchard)
sources.kon_koff: DERIVED: standard mAb kon 1e5/M/s, koff=kon*KD
sources.KD_CD3: BLI (MedChemExpress cevostamab QC): CD3e KD=3.265e-11 M (0.033nM)
sources.regimen: GO39775: IV Q3W single/double step-up, target up to 160 mg Q3W

tarlatamab.name: tarlatamab
tarlatamab.measured_vs_derived: DLL3 KD & CD3 KD MEASURED (Giffin 2021, human); kon 1e5 std -> koff DERIVED; turnover class-estimate; scFc fFcRn est
tarlatamab.validation_data: Rich: pop-PK 420 pts (DeLLphi-300/301), Cavg-vs-tumor-response & Grade>=3 TEAE (digitized), CRS ~50%

sources.KD_TAA: Giffin 2021 Clin Cancer Res 27(5):1526-37 DOI 10.1158/1078-0432.CCR-20-2845; human DLL3 KD=0.64 nM (0.50 nM NHP) [via MedChemExpress/GlpBio/TargetMol/AJPT PK review citing Giffin]
sources.KD_CD3: Giffin 2021 same; human CD3 KD=14.9 nM (12 nM NHP)
sources.kon_koff: No published per-arm SPR kon/koff; kon=1e5/M/s (standard mAb) assumed, koff=kon*KD DERIVED
sources.kint: DLL3 internalizing (Rova-T ADC target); ~1/day antigen-class estimate
sources.turnover: kdeg 0.5/day generic membrane-receptor estimate; ksyn_frac=kdeg (steady-state identity)
sources.format: HLE BiTE, anti-DLL3xanti-CD3 scFv fused to scFc (single-chain IgG Fc); ~100 kDa; Prot NCT04885998 sec2.2.2
sources.regimen: Imdelltra USPI: 1 mg IV C1D1, 10 mg C1D8 & C1D15, then 10 mg Q2W

cibisatamab.name: cibisatamab
cibisatamab.measured_vs_derived: Format (2:1 bivalent CEA / monovalent low-aff CD3) CONFIRMED (Bacac 2016); CEA & CD3 KD LITERATURE-ESTIMATE (patent/review, no clean primary SPR table accessible); kon/koff DERIVED; turnover class-estimate
cibisatamab.validation_data: PK + ADA time-course (digitized, Fimmu 2024); published QSP model (Ma 2020 AAPS J); dose-escalation Phase 1

sources.KD_TAA: Bacac 2016 OncoImmunology 5(8):e1203498 DOI 10.1080/2162402X.2016.1203498 - CEA-TCB monovalent CEA binding, high avidity via bivalency; monovalent CEA KD ~16 nM (B3 domain) LITERATURE-ESTIMATE (Roche patents)
sources.KD_CD3: Monovalent low-affinity CD3e (Bacac 2016 states 'monovalent low affinity binding to CD3e to avoid non-specific activation'); KD~80 nM LITERATURE-ESTIMATE
sources.kon_koff: No primary SPR kon/koff; kon=1e5/M/s std, koff DERIVED. NOTE: kon/koff in PSP4 supp (10.1002/psp4.70019) are ADA-complex kinetics, NOT drug-target - excluded
sources.kint: CEA (CEACAM5) GPI-anchored, slow internalization; ~0.3/day antigen-class estimate
sources.format: 2:1 CrossMab (RG7802): 2x CEA (bivalent avidity) + 1x CD3, effector-silent IgG1 Fc; ~194 kDa
sources.regimen: Phase 1 dose-escalation IV QW; representative ~100 mg QW (monotherapy up to 600 mg); exact step-up varies by cohort

tebentafusp.name: tebentafusp
tebentafusp.measured_vs_derived: ImmTAC platform CONFIRMED (affinity-enhanced TCR + humanized UCHT1 anti-CD3 scFv); gp100-HLA KD picomolar MEASURED-class (15 pM preclinical; BLI alt 0.776 nM); CD3 KD class-estimate; kon/koff DERIVED; NO Fc
tebentafusp.validation_data: PD-rich: serial cytokines (IL-6 CRS peak wk1-3), ctDNA kinetics (digitized), lymphocyte trafficking; approved (Kimmtrak)

sources.KD_TAA: gp100(YLEPGPVTA 280-288)/HLA-A*02:01; affinity-enhanced TCR KD~15 pM preclinical (Middleton 2020 CCR 26(22):5869 DOI 10.1158/1078-0432.CCR-20-1247; PMC10184536 ref40). Alt BLI KD=0.776 nM (MedChemExpress)
sources.KD_CD3: Humanized UCHT1 anti-CD3 scFv (ImmTAC platform, Nielsen/immadv ltae008 DOI 10.1093/immadv/ltae008); KD ~20 nM CLASS-ESTIMATE (UCHT1 range)
sources.kon_koff: Affinity-enhanced TCR has very slow off-rate (binding t1/2>12h class); kon=1e5 std, koff DERIVED (gives koff~1.5e-6/s, consistent w/ slow off-rate)
sources.kint: pMHC complex, slow surface turnover; ~0.15/day class-estimate
sources.format: ImmTAC: soluble affinity-enhanced TCR fused to anti-CD3 scFv; ~77 kDa; NO Fc (fFcRn=0)
sources.regimen: Kimmtrak USPI: 20 ug IV C1D1, 30 ug C1D8, 68 ug C1D15+, then 68 ug weekly

catumaxomab.name: catumaxomab
catumaxomab.measured_vs_derived: EpCAM arm FULLY MEASURED (Ruf 2007 Biacore Table 3: kon 6.1e4, koff 3.3e-5, KD 0.56 nM); CD3 (mouse) KD class-estimate; route=INTRAPERITONEAL (not IV)
catumaxomab.validation_data: Ascites PK pg/mL (digitized, Ruf 2010 BCP), serum PK, ALT liver-tox by dose (digitized, oncotarget 2016)

sources.KD_TAA: Ruf 2007 Br J Cancer 97:315 DOI 10.1038/sj.bjc.6603881 Table 3: catumaxomab monovalent EpCAM arm kass=6.1e4 M-1s-1, kdiss=3.3e-5 s-1, KD=5.6e-10 M (Biacore 3000) - ALL MEASURED
sources.KD_CD3: Mouse anti-CD3 arm (mouse IgG2a); KD ~20 nM CLASS-ESTIMATE (not separately published)
sources.kon_koff: EpCAM MEASURED (Ruf 2007); CD3 kon=1e5 std, koff DERIVED
sources.format: Triomab: rat IgG2b(anti-EpCAM) x mouse IgG2a(anti-CD3) hybrid, intact chimeric Fc binds FcgR (trifunctional); ~150 kDa; rodent Fc = poor human FcRn (fFcRn~0.3, t1/2~2.5 d)
sources.regimen: Removab: 4 IP infusions 10/20/50/150 ug on days 0,3,7,10 (or 7,10,13,16); INTRAPERITONEAL for malignant ascites

catumaxomab._audit_2026-07-13: KD_CD3 corrected 20.0 -> 4.4 nM. SQLite kinetics table, VERBATIM from Ruf 2010 (PMC2878603): 'intermediate affinity of catumaxomab to CD3 (KD=4.4 nM)'. koff_CD3 re-derived from kon*KD.

solitomab.name: solitomab
solitomab.measured_vs_derived: Canonical BiTE format CONFIRMED (MT110/AMG110); EpCAM KD CLASS-ESTIMATE (not accessible); CD3 KD CLASS-ESTIMATE (blinatumomab L2K/TR66 family low-affinity); kon/koff DERIVED
solitomab.validation_data: Phase 1 continuous IV (Kebenko 2018 OncoImmunology); GI/hepatic tox dose-limiting; limited PK

sources.KD_TAA: EpCAM BiTE binder (MT110); KD ~5 nM CLASS-ESTIMATE (no accessible primary SPR)
sources.KD_CD3: Canonical BiTE anti-CD3 (L2K/TR66 family, shared w/ blinatumomab) low-affinity ~260 nM CLASS-ESTIMATE
sources.kon_koff: kon=1e5 std, koff DERIVED
sources.format: Canonical BiTE (tandem scFv anti-EpCAM x anti-CD3); ~55 kDa; NO Fc (fFcRn=0), short t1/2 needs cIV
sources.regimen: Kebenko 2018 (DOI 10.1080/2162402X.2018.1450710): continuous IV infusion, dose-escalation; ~24 ug/day representative (up to ~96 ug/day); flag cIV

pasotuxizumab.name: pasotuxizumab
pasotuxizumab.measured_vs_derived: PSMA KD & CD3 KD LITERATURE (Friedrich 2012 cell-based saturation binding, full table paywalled); kon/koff DERIVED; PSMA kint MEASURED-class (rapid internalizer)
pasotuxizumab.validation_data: Phase 1 (Hummel 2021 Immunotherapy): PSA response >50% in 9/31 SC pts; cIV & SC PK; CRS

sources.KD_TAA: Friedrich 2012 Mol Cancer Ther 11(12):2664 (AMG212/BAY2010112); PSMA KD~47 nM LITERATURE (cell-based; primary table paywalled 403)
sources.KD_CD3: Friedrich 2012; CD3 KD~9.4 nM LITERATURE (cell-based)
sources.kon_koff: kon=1e5 std, koff DERIVED
sources.kint: PSMA rapidly & constitutively internalizes (t1/2~5-6h); ~3.3/day antigen-class estimate (well-established, PSMA radioligand/ADC biology)
sources.format: Canonical PSMA/CD3 BiTE; ~55 kDa; NO Fc (fFcRn=0)
sources.regimen: Originally continuous IV (Hummel); later SC dose-escalation; SC ~5 ug/day representative; flag SC/cIV

acapatamab.name: acapatamab
acapatamab.measured_vs_derived: Format CONFIRMED (HLE BiTE scFc, AMG160); PSMA & CD3 KD CLASS-ESTIMATE (Deegen 2021 paywalled, no accessible KD); kon/koff DERIVED; PSMA kint MEASURED-class
acapatamab.validation_data: Phase 1 (Deegen/CCR 2024 30(8):1488): PSA response, CRS common (27/32), step-up dosing; half-maximal lysis 6-42 pmol/L

sources.KD_TAA: AMG160 PSMA/CD3 HLE BiTE (Deegen 2021 CCR DOI 10.1158/1078-0432.CCR-20-3725, abstract only); PSMA KD ~1 nM CLASS-ESTIMATE
sources.KD_CD3: Amgen HLE BiTE anti-CD3; KD ~15 nM CLASS-ESTIMATE (per tarlatamab-class Amgen HLE BiTE)
sources.kon_koff: kon=1e5 std, koff DERIVED
sources.format: HLE BiTE scFc (2nd-gen, additional Fc for half-life); ~100 kDa; fFcRn~0.6
sources.regimen: IV Q2W with step-up to RP2D ~0.3 mg (NCT03792841); representative step-up 0.1/0.2/0.3 mg then 0.3 Q2W; flag

runimotamab.name: runimotamab
runimotamab.measured_vs_derived: HER2 arm = trastuzumab 4D5-WT, KD 0.3 nM LITERATURE (Staflin 2020); CD3 = clone 40G5c, KD CLASS-ESTIMATE (exact not confirmed); kon/koff DERIVED
runimotamab.validation_data: Phase 1a/b (Meric-Bernstam AACR 2025 CT204): monotherapy + trastuzumab combo; step-up needed for CRS; PK/PD

sources.KD_TAA: Staflin 2020 JCI Insight 5(7):e133757 DOI 10.1172/jci.insight.133757; HER2 arm=4D5(trastuzumab)-WT KD~0.3 nM LITERATURE (panel also reports 4D5 variants 0.3/14/49 nM)
sources.KD_CD3: anti-CD3 clone 40G5c (Genentech); KD ~50 nM CLASS-ESTIMATE (exact KD not cleanly published; runimotamab needs step-up+trastuzumab combo consistent w/ non-trivial CD3 engagement)
sources.kon_koff: kon=1e5 std, koff DERIVED
sources.format: 1+1 knob-into-hole IgG1 N297G (effector-silent) HER2xCD3; ~150 kDa; fFcRn~0.75
sources.regimen: Phase 1a/b IV Q3W (or QW) with step-up +/- trastuzumab (CT204); mg values representative step-up, flag

cinrebafusp_alfa.name: cinrebafusp_alfa
cinrebafusp_alfa.measured_vs_derived: *** NOT A CD3 TCE: engager arm is 4-1BB (CD137) COSTIM AGONIST. KD_CD3 slot REPURPOSED for 4-1BB (~5 nM). HER2=trastuzumab 0.3 nM LITERATURE; both arms BIVALENT (2+2). kon/koff DERIVED. REGIMEN IN mg/kg NOT mg ***
cinrebafusp_alfa.validation_data: Phase 1 (Hilton/CCR 2024 DOI 10.1158/1078-0432.CCR-24-1552): disposition Table S1 (n=78), cytokines IFNG/IP10/IL18 by dose (Tables S3-S5, digitized), PK

sources.KD_TAA: PRS-343: HER2 arm=trastuzumab IgG4-based KD~0.3 nM LITERATURE (Hinner 2019 CCR DOI 10.1158/1078-0432.CCR-18-3654)
sources.KD_CD3: *** 4-1BB (CD137) Anticalin, NOT CD3 *** KD~5 nM (anticalin, Hinner 2019) - placed in CD3 slot for runner compatibility, FLAG as 4-1BB costim
sources.kon_koff: kon=1e5 std, koff DERIVED
sources.kint: HER2 ~0.34/day class-estimate (TAA); 4-1BB costim receptor internalizes on agonism ~0.5/day
sources.format: 2+2: bivalent HER2 (trastuzumab IgG4) + 2x 4-1BB Anticalin fused to Fc C-term; ~170 kDa; fFcRn~0.75. Costimulatory agonist, NOT T-cell redirector
sources.regimen: Phase 1 IV (Hilton 2024): 0.0015-18 mg/kg Q3W/Q2W/QW; 8 mg/kg Q2W key expansion. *** DOSES IN mg/kg (x body wt for mg) ***
